phrases.en: Leo wants to talk to his sister far away.
phrases.zh: 利奥想和远方的姐姐聊天。

phrases.en: He opens the video call app.
He finds her name in his contacts.
phrases.zh: 他在联系人里找到她的名字。

phrases.en: He taps the video call button.
The phone rings while it waits for her.
Now they can see each other on the screen.
phrases.zh: 现在他们能在屏幕上看到彼此。

phrases.en: He turns on his camera so she can see his face.
phrases.zh: 他打开摄像头，好让她看到他的脸。

phrases.en: He cannot hear her well, so he turns up the volume.
phrases.zh: 他听不太清她说话，于是把音量调大。
他们一起聊天，一起欢笑。

phrases.en: He shows her his new apartment with the camera.
phrases.zh: 他用摄像头给她看他的新公寓。

phrases.en: When they are done, he says goodbye.
Then, he hangs up the call.
